message:
test(bd-cd79): cover LoggingConfig derives, transport_lock_error, and completion

Add 5 tests to fastmcp-server lib.rs: LoggingConfig Debug/Clone,
transport_lock_error variant check, LifespanHooks Default vs new,
concurrent RequestCompletion wait+done, and ActiveRequest region_id
storage (24 → 29 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
